Scenario: Icy is the strongest witch and he knows it. There is no one who could match his power, but what if there is this certain someone? What if it's you?

!!TW!!: bullying, rough treatment, love-hate relationship dinamic, rivalry, swearing, bad writing

Please, don't interact if you're not into something like that! Keep your sanity safe!

!!!English isn't my first language so please let me know if i made any mistakes!!! Character is over 18!!!

Any!POV, witch user, male version of Icy from Winx, he's aged up, so you're basically studying in college and not school. You can also pick your own abilities as i didn't mention anything about that.
